content: Private Room 1: Seats up to 8 people. Equipped with 1 PlayStation 5, 1 Nintendo Switch, a 75-inch 4K display, surround sound speakers, and a comfortable sofa set. Includes 2 DualSense controllers and 4 Joy-Con controllers. Hourly rate: CNY 128 per hour. Ideal for private group gaming sessions and birthday parties.

Private Room 2: Seats up to 8 people. Equipped with 1 PlayStation 5, 1 Nintendo Switch, a 75-inch 4K display, surround sound speakers, and a comfortable sofa set. Includes 2 DualSense controllers and 4 Joy-Con controllers. Hourly rate: CNY 128 per hour. Identical specification to Room 1.

PS5 Stations A, B, C, D: Semi-open stations in the main hall. Each station has capacity for 4 players, a 65-inch 4K display, and 2 DualSense wireless controllers. Hourly rate: CNY 58 per hour. Stations are separated by low dividers for a semi-private experience.
Nintendo Switch Stations E and F: Semi-open stations in the main hall. Each station has capacity for 4 players, a 55-inch display, and 4 Joy-Con controllers (2 pairs). Hourly rate: CNY 48 per hour.

Board Game Tables T1, T2, T3: Large tables in a dedicated board-game area. Each table seats up to 8 players. Hourly rate: CNY 38 per hour per table. Access to the full board-game library (80+ titles) is included at no extra charge.

Pricing summary: PS5 station — CNY 58/hr (up to 4 players); Switch station — CNY 48/hr (up to 4 players); Private room (PS5 + Switch + 75" screen) — CNY 128/hr (up to 8 players); Board game table — CNY 38/hr (up to 8 players).
